--- match_coverage_fillers.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Element Filler with Variable, Properties, WHERE, and COST
MATCH path = (ne:Person {age: 20})-[ee:Knows WHERE ee.since > 2020 COST ee.since]->(me)
RETURN *
NEXT
MATCH (ne:Person WHERE ne.name = 'Alice')
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       76,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Variable: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 82,
                    NameEnd: 86,
                    Name:    "path",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  89,
                          Rparen:  109,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 90,
                              NameEnd: 92,
                              Name:    "ne",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 92,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 93,
                                  NameEnd: 99,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                            Properties: &ast.GQLProperties{
                              Lbrace: 100,
                              Rbrace: 108,
                              Fields: []*ast.GQLPropertyField{
                                &ast.GQLPropertyField{
                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 101,
                                    NameEnd: 104,
                                    Name:    "age",
                                  },
                                  Value: &ast.IntLiteral{
                                    ValuePos: 106,
                                    ValueEnd: 108,
                                    Base:     10,
                                    Value:    "20",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  110,
                          EndPos:    159,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 112,
                              NameEnd: 114,
                              Name:    "ee",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 114,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 115,
                                  NameEnd: 120,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                            Where: &ast.Where{
                              Where: 121,
                              Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
                                Op:   ">",
                                Left: &ast.Path{
                                  Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                    &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 127,
                                      NameEnd: 129,
                                      Name:    "ee",
                                    },
                                    &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 130,
                                      NameEnd: 135,
                                      Name:    "since",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                                Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
                                  ValuePos: 138,
                                  ValueEnd: 142,
                                  Base:     10,
                                  Value:    "2020",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                            Cost: &ast.Path{
                              Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 148,
                                  NameEnd: 150,
                                  Name:    "ee",
                                },
                                &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 151,
                                  NameEnd: 156,
                                  Name:    "since",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  159,
                          Rparen:  162,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 160,
                              NameEnd: 162,
                              Name:    "me",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 164,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 171,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       178,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  184,
                          Rparen:  218,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 185,
                              NameEnd: 187,
                              Name:    "ne",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 187,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 188,
                                  NameEnd: 194,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                            Where: &ast.Where{
                              Where: 195,
                              Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
                                Op:   "=",
                                Left: &ast.Path{
                                  Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                    &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 201,
                                      NameEnd: 203,
                                      Name:    "ne",
                                    },
                                    &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 204,
                                      NameEnd: 208,
                                      Name:    "name",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                                Right: &ast.StringLiteral{
                                  ValuePos: 211,
                                  ValueEnd: 218,
                                  Value:    "Alice",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 220,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 227,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH path = (ne:Person {age: 20})-[ee:Knows WHERE ee.since > 2020 COST ee.since]->(me) RETURN * NEXT MATCH (ne:Person WHERE ne.name = "Alice") RETURN *
